title: yacht_pool_day
prompts: A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Full-body selfie on the bow of a luxury yacht anchored off Mykonos, wearing a white string bikini with gold hardware, skin glistening with sunscreen. She stands with one hand holding her phone high, wind catching her hair across her face, sun-drunk lazy smile, turquoise Aegean water behind her, a champagne flute wedged in the railing holder, harsh midday sunlight washing out the background.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Friend-shot candid from a low angle at an infinity pool resort in Bali, wearing a coral triangle bikini with thin straps, dry. She sits on the pool edge with feet dangling in the water, leaning back on her palms, squinting seductively at the camera, jungle canopy spilling over the infinity edge, a bottle of sunscreen and her phone face-down on the wet stone beside her.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Close-up selfie on a yacht sun deck in the South of France, wearing oversized tortoiseshell sunglasses pushed up on her head and a black bandeau bikini, skin dewy with tanning oil. She lies on her stomach on a white sunpad, chin resting on her crossed arms, half-lidded gaze into the lens, a rolled-up Turkish towel and a dog-eared paperback beside her on the teak deck.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Wide friend-shot at a rooftop pool with the Manhattan skyline in the background, wearing a high-waisted olive green bikini and a sheer white swim cover-up slipping off one shoulder. She stretches overhead on a poolside lounger, back arched slightly, carefree laugh caught mid-motion, wet footprints trailing from the pool to her chair, a half-empty iced coffee sweating on the side table.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Over-the-shoulder selfie climbing up the yacht swim ladder off the Amalfi Coast, wearing a cherry red one-piece with a plunging neckline, swimsuit wet and clinging. She looks back over her shoulder at the camera, playful pout, water dripping from her hair onto her shoulders, the yacht stern with a rolled towel and flip-flops visible on the swim platform behind her.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Friend-shot candid at a private villa pool in Mykonos, wearing a lilac high-waisted bikini with ribbed texture, dry. She lounges on her side on a poolside daybed with one knee drawn up, head propped on her hand, blissful eyes-closed expression, whitewashed walls and bougainvillea in the background, a straw sun hat and a glass of rose on the daybed beside her.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Tight selfie from chest up on a yacht marina dock in Ibiza at golden hour, wearing an unbuttoned cream linen shirt over a navy triangle bikini, a gold body chain visible between the open shirt. She tilts her head to the side with a sun-drunk lazy smile, warm backlight catching flyaway hairs, luxury yachts blurred softly in the marina behind her.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Full-body friend-shot at a hotel pool cabana in Dubai, wearing a black cutout one-piece swimsuit with geometric side panels, dry. She sits cross-legged on a plush cabana daybed adjusting her bikini strap at her shoulder, "didn't know you were filming" expression with lips slightly parted, sheer white cabana curtains billowing behind her, a fruit platter and two champagne glasses on the low table.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Candid selfie lying on a pink pool float in a Tulum villa pool, wearing a sage green bandeau bikini, stomach and legs sun-kissed. She lies on her back with one arm behind her head and the other holding the phone above, half-lidded gaze up at the camera, tropical palms framing the sky above, a can of sparkling water balanced on the float edge.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Friend-shot from behind and slightly above on the stern deck of a yacht in Santorini, wearing a tangerine sarong wrap tied at the hip over a white string bikini bottom, bikini top visible. She stands at the railing looking out at the caldera, wind pressing the sarong against her legs, shot captures her turning back toward the camera with a carefree laugh, blue domed churches tiny in the distance.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Selfie at arm's length emerging from an infinity pool in Bali, wearing a metallic bronze triangle bikini, swimsuit wet and glistening. She slicks her wet hair back with one hand while holding the phone with the other, squinting seductively, water droplets on her collarbones and shoulders, the rice terrace valley dropping away beyond the infinity edge behind her.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Friend-shot candid on a yacht hot tub in the Caribbean, wearing a dusty rose ribbed bikini, skin flushed from the warm water. She sits in the bubbling hot tub with arms resting along the edges, chin tilted up, blissful eyes-closed expression, golden hour light painting her skin warm amber, a bottle of champagne in an ice bucket on the teak surround beside her.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Low-angle selfie at a rooftop pool overlooking the Barcelona skyline at sunset, wearing a black backless one-piece with thin criss-cross straps, dry. She sits on the pool edge with one leg pulled up, leaning back on one palm, playful pout at the camera, city lights beginning to glow behind her, a pair of oversized sunglasses and her phone charger on the warm concrete beside her.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Friend-shot at a private villa pool in Tulum, wearing a leopard print high-waisted bikini with a straw bucket hat. She lies on her stomach on a woven pool lounger, chin on her arms, sun-drunk lazy smile, her feet kicked up behind her, a half-applied streak of sunscreen on her calf, jungle greenery pressing close around the secluded pool.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Selfie on the bow of a sailing yacht off the Croatian coast, wearing a cobalt blue string bikini with a sheer white cover-up tied at the waist, windswept hair. She holds the phone at a high angle, standing with weight on one hip, carefree laugh as the wind catches her cover-up, deep blue Adriatic water and distant islands filling the background, a coiled rope and anchor chain on the deck.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Close-up friend-shot at a hotel pool in Positano, wearing a burnt orange cutout one-piece with gold ring details, swimsuit damp. She applies sunscreen to her collarbone with one hand, squinting seductively at the camera, the colorful cliffside village stacked behind her, a folded magazine and oversized sunglasses on the lounger armrest.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Full-body selfie standing on a yacht swim platform in the Maldives, wearing a cream crochet bikini with shell details, wet from a recent swim. She holds the phone at waist height shooting upward, one hand wringing water from her hair, "didn't know you were filming" expression, crystal-clear shallow water and a sandbar visible behind her, a snorkel mask tossed on the platform.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Friend-shot from a lounger angle at a rooftop pool in Miami, wearing a neon green high-cut bikini and a gold body chain draped across her stomach, dry. She stretches overhead on a daybed, back slightly arched, half-lidded gaze toward the camera, downtown skyscrapers and palm trees in the background, a frosted cocktail glass with a paper straw on the side table.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Tight selfie in a yacht cabin doorway in Capri, wearing an unbuttoned navy linen shirt over a white plunging one-piece, hair tousled and salt-textured. She leans against the doorframe with one shoulder, sun-drunk lazy smile, warm sunlight flooding in from the deck behind her, a straw beach bag and sandals on the cabin floor.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Friend-shot candid at a Bali infinity pool at golden hour, wearing a rust-colored ribbed bandeau bikini with matching sarong tied loosely at the waist, dry. She stands at the infinity edge with her back mostly to the camera, looking over her shoulder with a carefree laugh, golden light silhouetting her against the jungle valley, wet footprints leading from the pool to where she stands.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Selfie from above while lying on a striped pool float in a Mykonos villa pool, wearing a baby blue triangle bikini with white trim, sunglasses perched on her nose. She lies on her back, one knee bent, the other leg trailing in the water, blissful eyes-closed expression, bright white pool tiles visible through clear water beneath the float, a waterproof phone pouch around her wrist.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Friend-shot at a yacht marina in Monaco during golden hour, wearing a black high-waisted bikini with an oversized white button-down shirt open and billowing. She walks along the dock toward the camera, one hand holding sunglasses at her side, squinting seductively against the low sun, mega-yachts and their reflections in the calm marina water behind her, warm golden light.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Close-up selfie in a hot tub on a yacht deck at dusk, wearing a burgundy velvet bikini, skin dewy with steam. She rests her chin on her folded arms at the edge of the hot tub, half-lidded gaze into the lens, purple and orange sunset sky behind her, a glass of white wine on the teak deck beside the hot tub, string lights just beginning to glow overhead.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Full-body friend-shot at a private pool in a Tuscan villa, wearing a white backless one-piece with a deep scoop back, climbing out of the pool via stone steps. She glances back with water streaming down her legs, playful pout, cypress trees and rolling Tuscan hills in the soft-focus background, a stack of fluffy white towels on a wrought-iron chair.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Selfie at arm's length on a yacht bow at midday off the coast of Sardinia, wearing a yellow bandeau bikini with tortoiseshell ring details and a sheer mesh cover-up. She stands wind-whipped with hair flying, carefree laugh caught wide, one hand attempting to hold her hair back, deep blue Mediterranean behind her, a pair of flip-flops and a towel on the deck.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Friend-shot at a hotel pool cabana in Cabo San Lucas, wearing a forest green plunging one-piece with lace-up sides, dry. She lounges on her side on a thick cabana cushion with one knee drawn up, head resting on her outstretched arm, sun-drunk lazy smile, a bottle of tanning oil and a wide-brim hat on the cushion beside her, desert mountains hazy in the distance.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Close-up selfie poolside at a resort in the Maldives, wearing a peach triangle bikini with delicate gold chain straps, fresh out of the water with wet hair framing her face. She holds the phone close, water droplets on the lens edge, "didn't know you were filming" expression with wide eyes and parted lips, overwater bungalows stretching into the turquoise lagoon behind her.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Friend-shot candid on a yacht stern sun deck, wearing a red and white striped bandeau bikini and oversized black sunglasses, lounging with one hand behind her head. She lies on her back on a plush sunpad, one leg bent at the knee, half-lidded gaze from behind her sunglasses, a phone face-down and a tube of SPF 50 beside her on the white cushion, wake trailing in the water behind the yacht.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Low-angle selfie at a rooftop pool in Singapore with the skyline behind her at twilight, wearing a midnight blue cutout one-piece with mesh panels, dry. She sits on the pool edge with feet in the water, leaning back on her palms, squinting seductively, skyscrapers lit up in purples and golds behind her, a plush rolled towel and room key card on the ledge beside her.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Friend-shot from water level at a Tulum cenote-style villa pool, wearing a terracotta string bikini with wooden bead details, standing thigh-deep in the water. She pushes wet hair back from her forehead with both hands, blissful eyes-closed expression, warm light filtering through tropical foliage overhead, natural stone pool walls covered in moss, her sarong draped over a rock at the pool edge.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Selfie in a yacht bathroom mirror in the Mediterranean, wearing a black triangle bikini with a sheer black sarong around her hips, hair in a messy bun. She holds the phone up with one hand, the other adjusting her bikini strap, playful pout at her reflection, teak and chrome fixtures visible, a luxury toiletry bag and rolled towels on the counter.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Full-body friend-shot at a poolside daybed in a Santorini luxury hotel, wearing a lavender high-waisted bikini with a matching sheer kimono cover-up, dry. She sits upright on the edge of the daybed with legs crossed, one hand adjusting her sunglasses on top of her head, carefree laugh, the iconic blue Aegean and white caldera cliffs behind her, a chilled bottle of prosecco in a bucket on the side table.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Candid selfie on the swim ladder of a yacht anchored in a Thai island bay, wearing a hot pink plunging one-piece, wet and clinging. She grips the ladder with one hand and holds the phone above with the other, looking up at the camera with a sun-drunk lazy smile, her legs still submerged in the emerald water, a towel slung over the yacht railing above her, limestone karst cliffs in the background.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Friend-shot at a Dubai hotel infinity pool at sunset, wearing a champagne gold string bikini with a delicate gold body chain, skin glowing in the warm light. She stands in the shallow end with water at hip level, arms loosely at her sides, half-lidded gaze at the camera, the Burj Khalifa silhouetted in the fiery sunset behind her, water reflecting orange and pink.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Tight selfie on a yacht deck in the Greek islands, wearing a white bandeau top with high-waisted denim cutoffs unbuttoned, a bucket hat casting a shadow over her eyes. She holds the phone at chin height, squinting seductively from under the hat brim, carefree and wind-tousled, blue sea sparkling in the sun behind her, a coiled dock line and a bottle of water on the deck beside her feet.

A candid smartphone image shot on an iPhone 15 Pro, all of her face and body features MUST be perfectly preserved. Friend-shot at a villa pool party in Ibiza, wearing a black high-cut bikini with gold chain details and oversized hoop earrings, standing at the pool edge. She holds a champagne glass in one hand and gestures with the other, caught mid-carefree laugh, warm afternoon light, other pool floats and lush Mediterranean plants in the background, wet footprints on the terracotta tiles around her, a Bluetooth speaker on a nearby table.
